description: Response schema for product-user-focus-group message-test mode. Each synthetic instance returns this object.

resonates_most.description: Label of the message variant (A, B, C, D) that resonates most

resonance_reason.description: Why this message lands — 2–3 sentences in first person

likely_to_click.description: Label of the variant most likely to prompt a click or action (may differ from resonates_most)

rejection.description: Any message variants that feel off, misleading, or wrong — keyed by variant label

additionalProperties.description: Reason this variant is rejected or feels wrong

verbatim.description: A single representative quote capturing the strongest signal from this instance
